title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Orochi, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Toko as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that's such a large sum...!! I've never seen this much money before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Komurasaki, this is part of the money that we will use to get you out of the red-light district.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know it's not nearly enough yet, but please hold onto it for now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Then... let's put this in writing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That won't be necessary!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only an idiot would doubt the woman they love....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Your word is all I need....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now, take it!! It's your money now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This much money... amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: I sold my warehouse, Komurasaki!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, my, you make me so happy. (7)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I sold my family!! Haha Ha... Cough Cough...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, my! You need to take care of yourself, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: FOFO... medicine is a waste of money.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I'm able to accomplish this feeble goal of mine, I'll be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The happiest person in the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I also dream every night... about the day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: where we will be able to be together.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yes... Komura- Saki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Cough Cough

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I finally have enough....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't even have a home to return to anymore....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's venture out into the world and start from nothing... it'll be just the two of us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got the final payment of 500 gold....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: with this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be able to free you, Komura- Saki!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My Apolo- Gies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Courtesan is not feel- ing well today...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will make sure she receives your package.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh no, that's not good!! Please make sure she gets it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And please tell her to rest well! I will come back another time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Коммента���������й!! Ive come to pick you up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You can leave the Red-light District now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let's Live Together!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Heh heh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DWA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AAAAHA!! HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: THIS PERVERTED GEZER SURE IS SOMETHING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... hey, you guys, don't just laugh, call her out here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Cough

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Komurasaki is going to be with me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Stop day- Dreaming, you moron!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you even have enough money to buy her!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Of course....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's holding on to it!! I left it in her care.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh... hello, Mr. Bingou. ()

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Ooooh!! Komurasaki!! Tell these guys.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They don't know about us....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...your money...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You said that it was mine, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I spent all of it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thank you.:)

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Puhahahahaha Hahahahahaha!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THAT GEZER REALLY THOUGHT KOMURASAKI FELL IN LOVE WITH HIM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hmmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WHO IS THAT SENILE GEEZER...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: UFOFO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Komura- Saki...

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: Boss... Boss Kyoshiro...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 61 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
